verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The secret of life is letting go The secret of love is letting it show In all that I do In all that I say Right here in this moment

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The power of prayer is in a humble cry The power of change is in giving my life I’m laying it down, down at Your feet Right here in this moment

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take my heart, take my soul I surrender everything to your control And let all this is within me lift up to You and say I am yours and yours alone Completely

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The journey of life is a search for truth This journey of faith is following you Every step of the way Through the joy and the pain Right here in this moment

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take my heart Take my soul I surrender everything to your control And let all that is within me lift up to you and say I am yours and yours alone Completely

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Right here, right now, and for the rest of my life Hear me say

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I am yours and yours alone Completely
